basic_details.short_information: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is recruiting 1 Research Assistant post with Post Graduate qualification in Social Sciences. Last date to apply is 12 July 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: To be informed to shortlisted candidates

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Social Science discipline with minimum 55% marks + NET/M.Phil./Ph.D.

how_to_apply: Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the interview date
No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview
Candidates must make their own arrangements for stay at Dhanbad if required
Note: Mere possession of minimum qualifications does not guarantee an interview call. Selection will be based on merit and project requirements.
important_instructions: Candidates will be shortlisted based on academic merit and relevance to the project. All correspondence will be done through the provided contact/email during application. This is a temporary project position with no claim for regular appointment at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad.

content_sections.heading: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad, Office of the Dean (Research & Development) has invited applications for Research Assistant under the ICSSR Project (Sanction No: 118/2025-26/ICSSR/FFSI/GEN dated 14/03/2026, Project No. SRDP 1297 G). The project titled "Shruti and Smriti Conceptions of the Indian Family System: Kutumb Prabodhan and Its Relevance to Global Cultural Diplomacy and Comparative Family Research" is led by Dr. Gyan Prakash. Download Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is recruiting 1 Research Assistant post with Post Graduate qualification in Social Sciences. Last date to apply is 12 July 2026.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_ism_dhanb: 01 Year or coterminous with the project

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.date_time: To be informed to shortlisted candidates

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 Job Description
content_sections.text: The Research Assistant will support research on Shruti and Smriti Conceptions of the Indian Family System. Responsibilities include conducting literature reviews on Sanskrit and Indian philosophical texts, collecting and analysing primary and secondary sources, assisting with translation and interpretation of classical texts, maintaining research databases, preparing reports and manuscripts, organising workshops and academic events, and supporting project documentation.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Post Graduate in Social Science discipline with minimum 55% marks + NET/M.Phil./Ph.D.
Background in Indian philosophy, Sanskrit, religious studies, social sciences, or related disciplines with strong academic writing and research skills

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 Fellowship & Other Benefits
content_sections.text: Fellowship: Rs. 37,000 INR per month No additional allowances mentioned Tenure: 1 Year or till the end of the project

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates should: Fill the Google Form: https://forms.gle/BexxXAGZSntQtqiH7 Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the interview date No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview Candidates must make their own arrangements for stay at Dhanbad if required Note: Mere possession of minimum qualifications does not guarantee an interview call. Selection will be based on merit and project requirements.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Candidates will be shortlisted based on academic merit and relevance to the project. All correspondence will be done through the provided contact/email during application. This is a temporary project position with no claim for regular appointment at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad Research Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application through Google Form is 12 July 2026 (5:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there for Research Assistant at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: There is 01 (one) Research Assistant position available under the ICSSR project.

faq.question: Q3. What is the monthly fellowship for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a fellowship of Rs. 37,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification required for IIT Dhanbad Research Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: Post Graduate in any Social Science discipline with minimum 55% marks and NET/M.Phil./Ph.D.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to this ICSSR Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the project title for the Research Assistant vacancy at IIT ISM Dhanbad?
faq.answer: Shruti and Smriti Conceptions of the Indian Family System: Kutumb Prabodhan and Its Relevance to Global Cultural Diplomacy and Comparative Family Research.

faq.question: Q7. Is NET qualification mandatory for IIT Dhanbad Research Assistant?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. along with Post Graduation (55% marks).

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the Research Assistant position at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through the official Google Form link provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Will shortlisted candidates be called for interview for this project?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be informed about the interview date via email or other means.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job or temporary position?
faq.answer: This is a temporary project-based position for 1 year or coterminous with the project duration.
